classObjective: Locate relative maxima and minima on a graph and describe the end behavior of a function using limit notation.
workedExamples: 3-5, Example 4 — Determine Extrema (Relative Maxima and Minima) from a Graph
3-5, Example 6 — Determine End Behavior Using Limit Notation
warmUp: Find the highest and lowest points on a hill — how does this relate to maxima and minima?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: turning points; peak/valley identification; end behavior as x approaches ±∞; limit notation
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice finding relative maxima/minima and describing end behavior using limit notation
independentPractice: Practice problems identifying extrema and describing end behavior of functions
assessment: Exit ticket: identify the relative maximum and minimum of a function and describe its end behavior
capReflection: How does understanding end behavior help you predict what happens to a function far from the origin?
